scripts.prestart: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const p='prisma/schema.prisma'; let s=fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8'); const u=process.env.DATABASE_URL||''; const sqlite='provider = ' + String.fromCharCode(34) + 'sqlite' + String.fromCharCode(34); const pg='provider = ' + String.fromCharCode(34) + 'postgresql' + String.fromCharCode(34); if(u.startsWith('postgres')){s=s.replace(sqlite,pg);}else{s=s.replace(pg,sqlite);} fs.writeFileSync(p,s,'utf8');" && prisma db push && prisma generate
scripts.postinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const p='prisma/schema.prisma'; let s=fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8'); const u=process.env.DATABASE_URL||''; const sqlite='provider = ' + String.fromCharCode(34) + 'sqlite' + String.fromCharCode(34); const pg='provider = ' + String.fromCharCode(34) + 'postgresql' + String.fromCharCode(34); if(u.startsWith('postgres')){s=s.replace(sqlite,pg);}else{s=s.replace(pg,sqlite);} fs.writeFileSync(p,s,'utf8');" && prisma generate
